headline: Guy's 'I'm Just Being Honest' Is Code For 'I Will Say Something Hurtful And Call It 'Real'
summary: 'I'm just being real,' Jake said. 'You're being mean,' his friend said. 'Realness is mean,' Jake said.
fullBody: Jake BrutalHonesty prides himself on 'telling it like it is.' He told his friend his art was 'fine.' 'I'm being honest,' Jake said. 'You're being hurtful,' his friend said. 'Honesty is pain,' Jake said. His friends have stopped sharing things with him. 'I don't understand,' Jake said. 'People can't handle the truth.' His therapist suggested 'maybe kindness.' 'Truth > kindness,' Jake said. He is alone.
